name: Applesauce Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a bowl, combine oil, applesauce, and cocoa powder. Mix in the sugar until dissolved.
3. Add eggs and vanilla extract; stir well.
4. In another bowl, mix together dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda).
5. Stir the dry mixture into the wet mixture until combined.
6. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square pan lined with wax paper or sprayed with cooking spray.
7. Sprinkle chopped nuts on top.
8. Bake for 20 to 30 minutes, or until the top is set but edges are not dried out (toothpick inserted comes out clean).
9. Cut into 16 squares.
